productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Brown Casual Shoes
description: Your search for that absolutely stylish and comfortable environment-friendly shoe comes to an end with the timberland Chauncey Oxfords. With a leather and nubuck upper, coupled with a high heel, this shoe offers comfort at its best.Heel: 3"UpperLeather upper with a nubuck patch on the midfoot and back heel Embroidered branding on the lateral heelNubuck and fabric inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortLace-up system in the forefoot for snug comfortPadded foam footbed with a leather lining for sweat-free, all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with rectangular lugs along the periphery and brand symbol lugs along the mid length of the forefoot for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel with a grooved rubber base for enhanced grip on smooth surfacesShoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a leather conditioner and nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
